title: Ultrasonic Studies for the Micro Estimation of Lead(Il) with Diethyldithiocarbamate
author: (MISS) SUNITA PRADHAN
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemical Laboratory, Holkar Science College, Indore 

  Manuscript received 27 December 1982, revised 5 October 1983, accepted 3 May 1984  

 Ultrasonic velocity measurements to an accuracy of ±0.05% have been determined in the micro estimation of lead (ll) using sodium diethyldithiocarbamate as reagent at 25 o . The adiabatic compressibilities calculated yielded results of quantitative significance.
